_comment: FIXTURE (anchor, REQ-025): keyed v2.0 run. With a sibling dispatch.key (per-run, 0600, 64-hex) and a dispatch-ledger.jsonl line whose 'tag' == HMAC-SHA256 Option-A over the sub-hash canon of this stage's claim (claim_nonce 0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef), the PostToolUse audit returns WITNESS_OK / exit 0. The key+ledger live next to the run state at runtime and are NEVER stored in this dir.
